zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Anna of Hungary於大約1227年出生在匈牙利布達佩斯時，她的父親Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király22歲，母親Maria Laskarina21歲。她和Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich至少有5個兒子和8個女兒。她去世於1274年在匈牙利享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Anna of Hungary于大约1227年出生在匈牙利布達佩斯时，她的父亲Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király22岁，母亲Maria Laskarina21岁。她和Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich至少有5个儿子和8个女儿。她去世于1274年在匈牙利享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.description: The Mongolian Tatars devastated the country. Their presence, which lasted a year, halted development for at least a century. After the warfare with the Hungarians, the Tatars did not continue towards the west.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Anna of Hungary was born about 1227, in Budapest, Hungary, her father, Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király, was 22 and her mother, Maria Laskarina, was 21. She had at least 5 sons and 8 daughters with Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich. She died in 1274, in Hungary, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Anna of Hungary est née environ 1227, à Budapest, Hongrie, son père, Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Maria Laskarina, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles avec Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich. Elle est décédée en 1274, à Hongrie, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Anna of Hungary um 1227 in Budapest, Ungarn geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király 22 und ihre Mutter Maria Laskarina 21. Sie hatte mit Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1274 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Ungarn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Anna of Hungary è nata il circa 1227 nel Budapest, Ungheria, sua padre, Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Maria Laskarina, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie con Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich. Morì nel 1274, nel Ungheria, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Anna of Hungaryが約1227年にハンガリーブダペストで生まれた時，父Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Királyは22歳，母Maria Laskarinaは21歳であった。彼女はPrince Rostislav Mikhailovichとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1274年にハンガリーで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Anna of Hungary(이)가 대략 1227년 헝가리 버다페스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Laskarina(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1274년 헝가리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Kyiv, Kiev Okrug, Kyiv, Ukraine, Soviet: Київ, Київська область, Україна, Советтер Союз

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Anna of Hungary nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Budapest, Hungria, seu pai, Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Maria Laskarina, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas com Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich. Ela faleceu em 1274, em Hungria, com 48 anos.

ru.Kyiv, Kiev Okrug, Kyiv, Ukraine, Soviet: Киев, Киевская область, Украина, Советский Союз
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Anna of Hungary родилась около 1227 г. в местности будапест, Венгрия, её отцу по имени Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Laskarina, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей от Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich. Она умерла в 1274 г. в местности Венгрия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Anna of Hungary nació aproximadamente 1227, en Budapest, Hungría, su papá, Árpád-házi IV. Béla Magyar Király, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Maria Laskarina, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas con Prince Rostislav Mikhailovich. Murió en 1274, en Hungría, a la edad de 48 años.
